title: BEM-865 queue processing check
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
processed = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
results_dir = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results')
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines()]
ok = 'Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' in lines
matches = []
if results_dir.exists():
    for f in results_dir.rglob('*bem865*'):
        if f.is_file():
            matches.append(str(f))
status = 'CLAUDE_WRITE_OK' if ok else ('QUEUE_PROCESSED_WAITING_RESPONSE' if processed.exists() else ('QUEUE_PENDING' if queue.exists() else 'QUEUE_MISSING'))
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM865_QUEUE_PROCESSING_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-865 queue processing check\nStatus: ' + status + '\nQueue exists: ' + str(queue.exists()) + '\nProcessed exists: ' + str(processed.exists()) + '\nResponse exact OK: ' + str(ok) + '\nResult matches:\n' + '\n'.join('- ' + m for m in matches) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('queue processing check: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
